title: Duck Wrap with Intensely Energizing Sauce
description: A Canadian twist on the classic wrap, featuring crispy duck and a tangy, intensely energizing sauce.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the duck breast with salt and pepper.
Grill the duck breast for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Let the duck rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
In a small bowl, mix together the intensely energizing sauce ingredients (see below).
Lay the wrap flat and spread a tablespoon of the intensely energizing sauce down the center.
Arrange the mixed greens, sliced red onion, and sliced bell pepper on top of the sauce.
Add the sliced duck breast and crumbled feta cheese on top.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
